content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
ere emu jergi morin juwan yan salimbi sere
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

### I am your linguistic expert, and while Manchu is not one of my strongest areas, I will do my best to provide a translation. The sentence "ere emu jergi morin juwan yan salimbi sere" seems to refer to something related to horses and possibly a specific count or description. A rough translation could be "Here are two young horses of your group." Please note that this translation might not be entirely accurate due to the complexity and specificity of the Manchu language. ###
